subject: Update libvirt box
commit_message:
Update libvirt box

- use containerd instead of docker
- replace the intergratedcloudnative/ubuntu1804 [0] with
  the generic/ubuntu2204 [1] box
- update ansible (2.9.7 -> 2.9.27)
- update kubespray (2.14.1 -> 2.23.3)
- this is an attempt to fix the broken pipeline

[0] last released 05.2020: https://portal.cloud.hashicorp.com/vagrant/discover/intergratedcloudnative/ubuntu1804
[1] last released 01.2024: https://portal.cloud.hashicorp.com/vagrant/discover/generic/ubuntu2204

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1513
Change-Id: If07ff94476ec98d4f60b98858e328dd27fb1a43d
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <Fiete.Ostkamp@telekom.de>
